query:
INSERT INTO lectures (title, description, objectives, sessionDate, duration, zoomLink, speakerBio, speakerTitle, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES (
  'Choosing the Right Study Design to Achieve the Best Outcome',
  'Join Dr. Abdullah Al Alawi for an essential session on selecting the optimal research study design for your clinical questions. Learn how different study designs impact the validity, feasibility, and impact of your research outcomes. 📚 This session will guide you through the decision-making process of choosing between observational and interventional studies, understanding when to use case-control vs cohort designs, and matching your research question to the most appropriate methodology.',
  '• Understand the hierarchy of evidence and how study design affects research quality\n• Learn to match your research question (PICO) to the appropriate study design\n• Compare strengths and limitations of observational vs interventional studies\n• Master the selection criteria for case-control, cohort, and cross-sectional designs\n• Identify common pitfalls in study design selection and how to avoid them\n• Develop a systematic approach to designing feasible and impactful clinical research',
  '2026-01-28 16:00:00',
  '60 minutes',
  'https://us02web.zoom.us/j/86479840360?pwd=cl9IYzFAcAb1oIxbZoVbW8GzhxiPOS.1',
  'Dr. Abdullah M. Al Alawi is a leading medical researcher and educator dedicated to building research capacity in Oman. With extensive experience in clinical research methodology and a passion for mentoring the next generation of medical researchers, Dr. Al Alawi has published numerous peer-reviewed articles and led multiple research training initiatives across the region.',
  'Co-Founder, MedResearch Academy | Senior Medical Researcher',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
command:

Learn how different study designs impact the validity, feasibility, and impact of your research outcomes. 📚 This session will guide you through the decision-making process of choosing between observational and interventional studies, understanding when to use case-control vs cohort designs, and matching your research question to the most appropriate methodology.',

  '2026-01-28 16:00:00',
  '60 minutes',
  'https://us02web.zoom.us/j/86479840360?pwd=cl9IYzFAcAb1oIxbZoVbW8GzhxiPOS.1',

With extensive experience in clinical research methodology and a passion for mentoring the next generation of medical researchers, Dr. Al Alawi has published numerous peer-reviewed articles and led multiple research training initiatives across the region.',
